title: Lei Shuo's Blog
subTitle: Welcome to my personal blog
script: <script src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/view-image.js@2.0.0/view-image.min.js'></script><script src='//busuanzi.ibruce.info/busuanzi/2.3/busuanzi.pure.mini.js'></script><script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){var s=document.createElement('style');s.innerHTML='/* 1. 暴力清除默认背景 */ html,body{background:transparent!important;background-color:transparent!important;width:100%;height:100%;margin:0;padding:0;overflow-x:hidden;} /* 2. 创建全屏流动背景层 */ #custom-bg{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100vw;height:100vh;z-index:-9999;background:linear-gradient(125deg,#a18cd1 0%,#fbc2eb 100%);background-size:400% 400%;animation:fluidBG 15s ease infinite;} @keyframes fluidBG{0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}} /* 3. 内容区域磨砂玻璃化 */ .markdown-body,.FileList{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.95)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);padding:30px!important;margin-top:20px!important;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.6);} /* 4. 隐藏默认头尾背景 */ .Header,.footer{background:transparent!important;border:none!important;} /* 5. 左侧固定导航栏 */ #left-sidebar{position:fixed;top:20px;left:20px;bottom:20px;width:260px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);z-index:999;padding:15px;overflow-y:auto;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.6);transition:transform 0.3s;} /* 搜索框样式 */ #search-input{width:100%;padding:10px;margin-bottom:15px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;outline:none;} #search-input:focus{border-color:#a18cd1;} .nav-item{display:block;padding:8px 10px;color:#444;text-decoration:none;margin-bottom:2px;border-radius:4px;font-size:14px;} .nav-item:hover{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#a18cd1,#fbc2eb);color:white;} .nav-group-title{font-weight:bold;margin:15px 0 5px;color:#333;font-size:15px;border-bottom:2px solid #f0f0f0;padding-bottom:5px;} /* 6. 响应式布局：大屏右移，小屏隐藏侧栏 */ @media(min-width:1300px){.markdown-body,.FileList{margin-left:300px!important;max-width:900px!important;width:auto!important;}} @media(max-width:1299px){#left-sidebar{transform:translateX(-300px);} #left-sidebar::after{content:"➤";position:absolute;right:-25px;top:50%;background:white;padding:10px 5px;border-radius:0 5px 5px 0;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:2px 0 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);} #left-sidebar:hover{transform:translateX(0);}}';document.head.appendChild(s);/* 注入背景元素 */ var bg=document.createElement('div');bg.id='custom-bg';document.body.appendChild(bg);/* 初始化图片放大插件 */ window.ViewImage&&ViewImage.init('.markdown-body img');/* 获取文章数据并生成侧边栏 */ fetch('/blogBase.json').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{var sb=document.createElement('div');sb.id='left-sidebar';var inp=document.createElement('input');inp.id='search-input';inp.placeholder='🔍 搜索文章...';inp.oninput=function(e){var v=e.target.value.toLowerCase();sb.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(i=>{i.style.display=i.innerText.toLowerCase().includes(v)?'block':'none'})};sb.appendChild(inp);var posts=Object.values(d).sort((a,b)=>b.id-a.id);var cats={};posts.forEach(p=>{var l=p.labels[0]||'未分类';if(!cats[l])cats[l]=[];cats[l].push(p)});Object.keys(cats).sort().forEach(c=>{var t=document.createElement('div');t.className='nav-group-title';t.innerText=c;sb.appendChild(t);cats[c].forEach(p=>{var a=document.createElement('a');a.className='nav-item';a.href=p.postUrl;a.innerText=p.postTitle;sb.appendChild(a)})});document.body.appendChild(sb)}).catch(e=>console.log(e));});</script>
